options.command: bash -lc 'echo $$ > .firebase-emulators.pid; exec npx firebase emulators:start --project demo-pushup-stats --only auth,firestore'
bash -lc 'echo $$ > .firebase-emulators.pid; exec npx firebase emulators:start --project demo-pushup-stats --only auth,firestore'
npx firebase emulators:exec --project demo-pushup-stats --only auth,firestore "echo emulator-ok"
